framework.name: Chained Delegation Assertions in JWT
framework.description: A-JWT uses chained delegation assertions (not recursive token exchange) to prove which downstream agent may execute a task. This is a token-nesting approach where delegation proof is embedded in the token rather than exchanged at each hop.
framework.raw_quote: a chained delegation assertion to prove which downstream agent may execute a given task

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
